ddls:
CREATE TABLE "abalones" (
  "abalone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abalone */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the abalone */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the abalone */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the abalone */,
  "whole_weight" REAL /* Whole weight of the abalone */,
  "shucked_weight" REAL /* Shucked weight of the abalone */,
  "viscera_weight" REAL /* Viscera weight of the abalone */,
  "shell_weight" REAL /* Shell weight of the abalone */,
  "rings" INTEGER /* Number of rings, which indicates the age of the abalone */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the abalone */,
  "spawn_date" TEXT /* Spawn date of the abalone */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection the abalone belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abalone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abalones_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who collected the abalone */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the abalone was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the abalone was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the abalone */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the abalone was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "abalone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the abalone being measured */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the abalone */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the abalone */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the abalone */,
  "measurer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who took the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_abalone_id FOREIGN KEY ("abalone_id") REFERENCES abalones ("abalone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurer_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurer_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight record */,
  "abalone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the abalone being weighed */,
  "weight_date" TEXT /* Date when the weight was recorded */,
  "whole_weight" REAL /* Whole weight of the abalone */,
  "shucked_weight" REAL /* Shucked weight of the abalone */,
  "viscera_weight" REAL /* Viscera weight of the abalone */,
  "shell_weight" REAL /* Shell weight of the abalone */,
  "weigher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who recorded the weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weights_weigher_id FOREIGN KEY ("weigher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weights_abalone_id FOREIGN KEY ("abalone_id") REFERENCES abalones ("abalone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rings" (
  "ring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ring record */,
  "abalone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the abalone being counted */,
  "ring_date" TEXT /* Date when the rings were counted */,
  "rings" INTEGER /* Number of rings, indicating the age of the abalone */,
  "ringer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who counted the rings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rings_abalone_id FOREIGN KEY ("abalone_id") REFERENCES abalones ("abalone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rings_ringer_id FOREIGN KEY ("ringer_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher participating in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "researcher_id")
)
